title: 7 Days to Craft
description:
Survive, build, and fight your way through the apocalypse.
Every day is a new chance — or your last.
body:
📜 Description

7 Days to Craft turns the peaceful block world into a brutal survival challenge.
Inspired by 7 Days to Die, this modpack adds realism, danger, and atmosphere to every single day you survive.

💀 Survive the apocalypse:
Manage hunger, thirst, temperature, and infection — every choice matters.

🧟 Zombies everywhere:
Random hordes roam during the day, but nights are far deadlier. Stay safe or die trying.

🔧 Loot and progress:
Search abandoned buildings for food, water, weapons, and rare crafting materials.

🏠 Build and defend:
Create fortified shelters, traps, and barriers to survive the undead siege.

🌧️ Immersion and realism:
Enhanced visuals, ambient sounds, blood effects, and detailed injury systems — every detail counts.
